calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Continued To Aug-03-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Amy Grant 517-604-0089 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Jennifer Paez, Esq. 415-392-8300 for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

Ms. Paez accepts the TR and requests for the TR to be adopted; states parties are in discussions.
Ms. Grant informs the Court she could not understand the process, could not find an attorney, severe head injury, willing to walk away, parties drawing up papers for dsmissal.
The Court comments and encourages parties to continue to talk and try to resolve the case.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant Dignity Community Care's unopposed Motion for Summary Judgment or Summary Adjudication is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-27-2026 Continued To Apr-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs DIGNITY COMMUNITY CARE DBA SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL; DIGNITY HEALTH) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication.

Continued on the court's motion to April 9, 2026.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Amy Grant 517-604-0089 grantamy07@gmail.com Plaintiff.
Michael Hale, Esq. 415-400-7002 hale@lmslaw.com LMS LAW for Moving party.

Hearing is held In-camera. The court orders all participants not directly involved in the motion to leave Zoom and the courtroom. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

LIUZZI, MURPHY, SOLOMON, CHURTON, HALE & WINNETT, LLP, Michael E. Hale's Motion to be RElieved as Counsel for Plaintiff Amy Grant.

Granted. Order is signed.
